arts.ttl: Ederson sets record for most Premier League assists by a goalkeeper
arts.sum: Ederson's chip for Omar Marmoush's first strike against Newcastle United means he has now contributed more assists than any other goalkeeper in Premier League history. With six Premier League titles and three Golden Gloves, this latest record cements Ederson ‘s status as one of the division’s greatest ever goalkeepers.

arts.ttl: Why Nathan Ake and Ruben Dias are missing Man City vs Newcastle
arts.sum: Manchester City were without three of the four defenders that started against Real Madrid when they took on Newcastle

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish is left OUT of Man City's squad to face Newcastle - two days after he was seen 'worse for wear' in late-night exit from A-list hotspot
arts.sum: Jack Grealish was left out of Man City's squad for their game against Newcastle on Saturday, just two days after a late-night out from an A-list hotspot in London.

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Newcastle – Match Preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City battle it out with Newcastle United this afternoon with the result potentially of great significance. The two sides are level in the table with 41 points apiece and the winner of the contest would be in an advantageous position to secure Champions League qualification. arts.ttl: Man City vs. Newcastle confirmed lineups: Gonzalez debut, Khusanov, Gordon, Burn decisions made
arts.sum: Manchester City and Newcastle United confirm their starting lineups for this afternoon's Premier League top-four battle at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United spring a surprise as £38m man returns to the bench and full-backs tweaked
arts.sum: Howe was also able to recall Dan Burn to the heart of his defence with the Blyth lad recovered from a groin injury suffered at Birmingham City in the FA Cup fourth round win last weekend. Burn partnered Fabian Schar in the heart of defence while Kieran Trippier started the game at right-back at the expense of Tino Livramento.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak future: Newcastle striker 'makes preference clear' amid Barcelona, Arsenal, Liverpool transfer talk
arts.sum: Newcastle United forward Alexander Isak is allegedly 'very interested' in joining Liverpool at the end of the campaign.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Newcastle and Villa looking to raid top-four rivals for €50m-rated forward
arts.sum: Arsenal, Newcastle United and Aston Villa are keen on signing the Chelsea striker Nicolas Jackson at the end of the season. The former Villarreal striker has shown improvement this season and he has done reasonably well for the Blues.
